title: Titan Eyeplus is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Titan Eyeplus is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Titan Eyeplus family as a E-commerce Executive in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Titan Eyeplus:
Titan Eyeplus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
